reasons: pull request template and self-dogfood example only

change.summary: Add a PR template with a proof-pr block placeholder and a self-dogfood config.
change.scope_notes: Use for low-risk proof-pr repository metadata/docs changes.

secrets_scan.summary: No secret-bearing source, workflow, or environment file changed.

permission_diff.summary: No workflow permissions, token scopes, or agent-access settings changed.

redaction.summary: No screenshots or captured UI artifacts are attached.

rollback.path: Revert the PR to remove the template/config additions.
